title: Mine Hero RX
description: A mod that aims to integrate Kohei Horikoshi's My Hero Academia universe with content from the anime, games, oavs and movies in a Minecraft mod, which will also be designed as a Solo/Multiplayer RPG experience!
body:
**Welcome to the Mine Hero RX Mod Page!**

Mine Hero RX is a fan-made Minecraft mod inspired by Kohei Horikoshi's My Hero Academia universe. It brings content from the anime, movies, OVAs, and games into Minecraft, designed as a solo/multiplayer RPG experience.

 

**The Discord Server:**

Join the community to chat with others, ask for help, find a group to play with or find the official servers that will be opening soon, see the teaser before the youtube channel! Mine Hero RX Official Discord Server
 

**The Youtube Channel:**

You'll soon be able to find tutorials, teasers, trailers and more on the Youtube channel : @r3tr0_st

**Support Me for MORE!**

Hello, I'm currently unable to find a job so I've set about developing "Mine Hero RX" which is a passion project developed in my free time, because I love My Hero Academia and want to share my passion for this universe.

The mod will always remain 100% free for everyone. If you like my work and want to support me as a creator, you can do so on Patreon/Ko-fi — your help allows me to dedicate more time to the mod as I'm trying to produce a high-quality mod and I want to do it for the long term.

**Incompatibility Notes**

This mod is incompatible with “Particle Core,” as it causes the game to crash when you try to generate a photon particle. As for “Subtle Effects,” it doesn't cause a crash, but the mod's photon effects won't appear! Its caused by the API so as long as they don't fix it themselves, the incompatibility will remain!

**Here's The Team:**

The Current MHRX's Mod Development/Staff team (neoforge 1.21.1+):

R3TR0/r3tr0st - Owner, Founder, Project Leader, Designer, Main Modeler, Coder, Interfaces/HUD, Animator, Writer, etc!

DarkDXD - VFX

**Special Thanks:**
 
Thanks to the Mcreator Team for the Wonderful Software they made, without it, it wouldn't have been possible! And Klemen is the real Goat!

Thanks to the two Goats Nerdy Puzzle and Renan for the amazing help and possibilities they lend me on the project with their amazing plugins!

**Disclaimer:**

"Mine Hero RX" is an unofficial fan project inspired by the My Hero Academia universe. It is completely non-commercial and will always remain free. This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by Shueisha, Bones, Toho, Bandai Namco, or Kohei Horikoshi. All rights to My Hero Academia and related media belong to their respective owners.
